headline: Assessing Fox Corp. (FOXA) Valuation As 2026 World Cup Advertising Upside Draws Attention
summary: World Cup spotlight puts Fox stock in focus Fox (FOXA) is back on investor radars after recent research highlighted its English-language broadcast rights for the 2026 FIFA World Cup and linked the stock to an estimated US$850 million in tournament advertising spend. See our latest analysis for Fox. Beyond the World Cup angle, Fox's share price has been firming, with a 15.01% 90 day share price return and a 24.82% one year total shareholder return. However, the year to date share price...
